title: Classic Canadian Beef Lasagna
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring rich, roasted beef and layers of lasagna noodles, rich cheese and tomato sauce.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: 80/20 lean to fat ratio works best for this recipe

ingredients.name: Rich, Roasted Beef
ingredients.notes: Use leftover roast beef or roast in oven at 300°F for 2-3 hours

instructions: Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking up with a spoon as needed.
Add tomato sauce, salt, and black pepper. Simmer for 10-15 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine shredded mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of tomato sauce.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over noodles, followed by half of the shredded cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with noodles, then sauce, then cheese.
Top with remaining cheese and cover with foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
